Pricing Guide

Transparent Pricing for Quality Insulation

At Yorkshire Insulations, we believe in transparent and competitive pricing for all our insulation services. Use our interactive pricing calculators to get an estimate for your project. Our team is ready to provide you with a free, no-obligation quote tailored to your specific needs. Whether you're looking for loft insulation, cavity wall insulation, solid wall insulation, or spray foam services, we have competitive rates across Yorkshire.

Loft Insulation

Loft Insulation

Top-ups from £8/sqm - no VAT on eco installations

Calculated area: 10.0 sqm

Estimated cost

Confirmed after assessment

£80 - £120

No VAT applies on eco top-up installations

Cavity Wall

Cavity Wall Insulation

From £23/sqm - assessment fee deducted from your bill

Estimated cost

Includes man, labour and product

£23

£100 + VAT assessment fee is deducted from your final bill if you go ahead

Spray Foam Removal

Spray Foam Removal

Open cell from £52/sqm - closed cell from £80/sqm

Estimated cost

Confirmed after surveyor assessment

Enter details above

Closed cell foam is more complex to remove - we recommend a surveyor assessment before booking

Additional Extras

Loft Extras

Boarding, hatches and ladders - build your own package

Loft boarding

£50 + VAT per sqm - includes boards, batons, screws and fixings

Loft ladder

Ask for pricing - added to your hatch quote

Extras estimateAdd items above
Additional Services

More Insulation & Energy Solutions

Competitive pricing for additional insulation and energy services

Solid Wall Insulation

Improve thermal efficiency of solid brick walls

£800 - £1,500+

Price varies based on property size and wall condition

Room in Roof Insulation

Perfect for conversions and rooms in the roof

£500 - £800

Price depends on roof size and complexity

External Wall Insulation

Enhance appearance and thermal performance

£1,200 - £2,500

Price varies based on property size and finish type

Internal Wall Insulation

Internal solutions where external options aren't suitable

£600 - £1,200

Price depends on room size and preparation required

Floor Insulation

Reduce heat loss through solid and suspended timber floors

£350 - £600

Price depends on floor area and access

Solar Panel Installation

Generate your own electricity and reduce energy bills

£3,000 - £6,000+

Price depends on system size and roof orientation

Boiler Installation

Energy-efficient boiler installation and replacement

£2,000 - £4,000+

Price depends on boiler type and installation complexity

All prices are estimates. Final quotes are provided after a free on-site survey. Contact us for accurate pricing tailored to your property.

Yorkshire Insulations

Based in Yorkshire and working across the region, our experienced team delivers loft insulation, cavity wall insulation, spray foam removal, underfloor insulation, and new build insulation.
